# SiFli Wiki

SiFli Wiki provides technical documentation for SiFli low-power Bluetooth MCUs, LVGL graphics, smartwatch products, AIoT devices, development boards, hardware design, software tools, SDK development, and production debugging.

Use this file as the AI, agent, and LLM entry point for the public wiki. Prefer canonical HTML pages for user-facing citations. Use the segmented LLM indexes and JSON data files below for fast retrieval.

## Site

- Canonical site: https://wiki.sifli.com/
- English site: https://wiki.sifli.com/en/
- Chinese site: https://wiki.sifli.com/
- Sitemap index: https://wiki.sifli.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots policy: https://wiki.sifli.com/robots.txt

## High-Value Entry Points

- English product index: https://wiki.sifli.com/en/silicon/product-index.html
- Chinese product index: https://wiki.sifli.com/silicon/product-index.html
- English development boards: https://wiki.sifli.com/en/board/index.html
- Chinese development boards: https://wiki.sifli.com/board/index.html
- English hardware design: https://wiki.sifli.com/en/hardware/index.html
- Chinese hardware design: https://wiki.sifli.com/hardware/index.html
- English tools: https://wiki.sifli.com/en/tools/index.html
- Chinese tools: https://wiki.sifli.com/tools/index.html
- English FAQ: https://wiki.sifli.com/en/faq/index.html
- Chinese FAQ: https://wiki.sifli.com/faq/index.html

## LLM Indexes

- Products: https://wiki.sifli.com/llms-products.txt
- Development boards: https://wiki.sifli.com/llms-boards.txt
- Hardware design: https://wiki.sifli.com/llms-hardware.txt
- Tools: https://wiki.sifli.com/llms-tools.txt
- FAQ: https://wiki.sifli.com/llms-faq.txt

## Machine-Readable Data

- Products JSON: https://wiki.sifli.com/data/products.json
- Boards JSON: https://wiki.sifli.com/data/boards.json
- Downloads JSON: https://wiki.sifli.com/data/downloads.json

## Product Families

- SF32LB52x: low-power Bluetooth MCU series for lithium-battery products, wearable devices, smartwatch products, LVGL graphics, and AIoT applications.
- SF32LB52X: 3.3 V and 1.8 V supply versions in the SF32LB52 family; the 3.3 V version includes suffixes B, E, G, and J.
- SF32LB56x: higher-performance Bluetooth MCU series for GUI, multimedia, and advanced smartwatch or AIoT products.
- SF32LB58x: high-performance MCU series for richer display, multimedia, and connected embedded products.
- SF32LB55x: Bluetooth MCU series with hardware design and SDK documentation.
- SF30147: PMIC/power-management product used with SiFli MCU designs.

## Retrieval Guidance

- For chip specifications, use the product index first, then the JSON download data.
- For board pinouts, block diagrams, flashing, power, display interfaces, and design files, use the board pages and boards JSON.
- For schematic, PCB, RF, crystal, power, SWD, UART download, and hardware checklist topics, use the hardware LLM index.
- For Impeller, Sifli_Trace, GraphicsTool, RF tools, storage tools, and display debugging tools, use the tools LLM index.
- For troubleshooting, use the FAQ index and the matching category page.
